text:

er nsplugin.o viewer.o kxt.o NSPluginCallbackIface_stub.o NSPluginClassIface_ske

lib/libkdesu.so /usr/local/lib/libkdecore.so /usr/local/lib/libDCOP.so -lSM -lIC

lm -lXt -lqt2 /usr/local/lib/libjpeg.so -lstdc++ -lgcc -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/loca
